name: proxy
description: AWS 多节点代理场景（抢占式实例），ap-east-1 区域，默认 10 台 t4g.nano 节点（shadowsocks-libev），支持 R2 上传 clash 配置（ARM64 架构）
description_en: AWS multi-node proxy scenario (spot instances) in ap-east-1 region with 10 t4g.nano nodes (shadowsocks-libev) by default, supports R2 upload clash configuration (ARM64 architecture)
